caption: A person is shown in a close-up shot, wearing a dark-colored hooded garment. They hold a small, green plant sprig to their nose and mouth, appearing to smell it. The scene then transitions to a wide shot of a beach under an overcast sky, where white waves are breaking and rolling toward the shore across a greyish-blue ocean. The footage then becomes distorted with a semi-transparent overlay and visual artifacts that blur the image of the crashing waves. The sequence concludes with a clear view of the surf continuing to wash onto the sandy coastline, maintaining the same muted, cool color palette throughout the coastal imagery. There are no visible logos or on-screen text.
